block_01: We would like to inform you that the minimum deposit amount for traders from EEA countries will soon be changed from 10 USD/EUR/GBP to 50 USD/EUR/GBP. According to our data, such an increase in the deposit amount translates into an increase of the average return per trader of more than 30%. In turn, that should mean more affiliate commission for you. Please make sure to update all your marketing materials that contain the information about the minimum deposit amount accordingly. The changes have to be made by February 10th, 2022. The minimum investment amount remains the same — $1 or an equivalent in the account currency.

block_07: Depending on the language of your materials and the target audience, the following adjustments have to be made:
block_08: If your materials are in a language that is widespread in Europe, such as English, and/or you target traders from both EEA and non-EEA countries, it should be clearly stated that the minimum deposit amount for traders from non-EEA countries is $10 and the minimum deposit amount for traders from EEA countries is $50 (or an equivalent in the account currency).
block_09: If your materials are in a language that is used predominantly in EEA countries, such as German or Swedish, and/or you target traders from EEA countries only, it should be clearly stated that the minimum deposit amount is $50 (or an equivalent in the account currency). Furthermore, such materials should not mention or promote instruments or features that are not available to retail traders from EEA countries, e.g., binary options, higher leverages, trading tournaments, and VIP status.
